title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at NIIT Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at NIIT Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Asia Pacific Associates in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Asia Pacific Associates:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Asia Pacific Associates!
